name: Beef Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh mushrooms, cleaned and sliced
2 lbs Boneless beef chuck, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown mushrooms and onions in hot shortening. Cook and stir until onions are tender; remove vegetables and set aside.
2. Brown meat in the same skillet; remove from heat. Add salt, pepper, thyme, marjoram, and flour, mixing well.
3. Stir in beef broth, return to heat, and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Boil for 1 minute; stir in Burgundy wine. Cover and simmer for 1½ to 2 hours or until meat is tender. If necessary, add broth and wine to ensure the meat remains covered. Stir in cooked onions and mushrooms, and cook uncovered for 15 minutes or until heated through. Serves 6
